chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْجَدُ عَلَيْهِ وَ مَا يُكْرَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 27 – What one can perform Sajdah upon and what is disliked

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/148)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/148)
text: لَا تَسْجُدْ عَلَى الذَّهَبِ وَ لَا عَلَى الْفِضَّةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Al Waleed, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Neither perform Sajdah upon the gold, nor the silver’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn al-Walid from Yunus from Ya’qub who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not perform Sajdah (prostration) on gold or on silver.’”
